def correct_bracketing(brackets: str):
    """This function takes a string composed of '(' and ')' characters. It verifies that each '(' has a corresponding ')', returning True if the condition holds.

    >>> correct_bracketing("(")
    False
    >>> correct_bracketing("()")
    True
    >>> correct_bracketing("(()())")
    True
    >>> correct_bracketing(")(()")
    False
    """
